labels: plugin-submission

## Plugin details

**Name:**
**Type:** (Translator / OCR / TTS / Spell Checker / Dictionary / Other)
**Repository URL:**
**Latest release / download:**

## Description

<!-- One or two sentences describing what your plugin does and which service/API it wraps. -->

## Installation instructions

<!-- Brief steps — users should be able to install and configure it from this section alone. -->

## Requirements

<!-- API key needed? Account required? Any other prerequisites? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The plugin JAR is available for download (not just source code)
- [ ] The plugin works with the current QTranslate release
- [ ] The repository has a README with setup instructions
- [ ] I built this plugin myself or have permission to submit it
- [ ] The plugin does not contain malicious code

---

By submitting this issue you agree the plugin may be listed publicly in the QTranslate README and wiki, and removed at the maintainer's discretion if it becomes unmaintained or violates these guidelines.
